name: Second Wind
description: You have a limited well of stamina that you can draw upon to regain hit points as a bonus action.

name: Action Surge
description: You can push yourself beyond your normal limits, taking one additional action on your turn.

name: Martial Archetype
description: Choose a Martial Archetype, which grants additional features as you gain Fighter levels.

name: Indomitable
description: You can reroll a failed saving throw, but must use the new roll.
